case_title: ANCHOR GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY VS. LATONYA FAYE WILLIAMS ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-21-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE OCT-18-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
